summary: Frontend testing of P2P Exchange platform with expanded Russian payment methods completed successfully. All 9 requested features verified working correctly.
passed_tests: Trader offer creation with extended payment methods (11 options: Сбербанк, Тинькофф, Альфа-Банк, Райффайзен, ВТБ, QIWI, ЮMoney, СБП, СБП QR-код, SIM баланс, Другой банк)
Trader offer form has payment details section (card number, holder name fields)
Trader offer form shows SBP phone/bank fields when СБП or СБП QR-код is selected
Trader offer form has conditions/rules field (textarea for trader terms)
Test shop page at /shop displays correctly with TestShop header, balance, deposit button, test products
Test shop deposit page with amount selection (500₽, 1000₽, 2500₽+5%, 5000₽+10%, 10000₽+15%, 25000₽+20%)
Test shop creates payment links successfully (after merchant activation)
PayPage shows trader selection with payment methods displayed on offer cards
PayPage payment step shows trader's payment details (card number, holder name, SBP phone, SBP bank)
PayPage shows trader conditions in highlighted section with warning icon
seed_data_creation: Created offer with payment details: card_number='4276 1234 5678 9012', card_holder='IVAN PETROV', sbp_phone='+7 900 123 45 67', sbp_bank='Тинькофф', conditions='Перевод только с карты на имя владельца. Без комментариев к переводу. Время на оплату - 15 минут.' Activated test_shop_merchant via admin approval.
context_for_next_testing_agent: All new features working correctly. Test credentials: admin/admin123, trader1/trader123, merchant1/merchant123, test_shop_merchant/testshop123 (activated). Trader1 has an offer with payment details and conditions. Test shop at /shop creates payment links that redirect to /pay/:linkId for the full payment flow.
